dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4830 IS: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 86–014 Farrington Highway in Waianae, Hawaii, as the “United States Representative Colleen Hanabusa Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schatz (for himself and Ms. Hirono) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 86–014 Farrington Highway in Waianae, Hawaii, as the United States Representative Colleen Hanabusa Post Office Building.

section.header: United States Representative Colleen Hanabusa Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 86–014 Farrington Highway in Waianae, Hawaii, shall be known and designated as the United States Representative Colleen Hanabusa Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the United States Representative Colleen Hanabusa Post Office Building.
